channel.title: presentation on Ziniu Li
channel.description: Recent content in presentation on Ziniu Li

item.title: Presentation
item.description: Talks [2020-10-24] Efficient exploration by novelty pursuit. DAI 2020, online. [slides] Paper Reading My paper reading presentation at the following seminar: RL Group at CUHKSZ, Deep Learning Group at CUHKSZ. [2021-04-15] Margin maximum and implicit bias. Deep Learning Group at CUHKSZ. [slides] [2021-04-09] Policy gradient methods. RL Group at CUHKSZ. [slides] [2021-03-09] Implicit bias of gradient descend on separable data. RL Group at CUHKSZ.
